rules.title: Application or service repeated crash events
recommendedActions: verify latest OS updates
update impacted application
review faulting module
collect dump if repeated

rules.title: NTFS file system corruption events
recommendedActions: back up critical data
chkdsk /f /r
verify disk hardware

rules.title: Storage timeout or overload events
recommendedActions: check storage performance
verify controller capacity
update storage drivers or firmware

rules.title: Get Help command line Microsoft 365 diagnostic source
recommendedActions: Run Get Help command-line scenario outside WindowsDoctor
Import output as external diagnostic evidence

rules.title: Device Manager hardware error codes
recommendedActions: Record Device Manager code and device name
Update, roll back, or reinstall driver only after confirmation
Contact hardware vendor when Microsoft guidance requires vendor support

rules.title: Graphics device Code 43 driver or hardware failure
recommendedActions: Update graphics driver
Roll back recent driver when appropriate
Uninstall/reinstall device only after confirmation
Treat hardware failure as manual review

rules.title: Winsock catalog corruption reset
recommendedActions: netsh winsock reset

rules.title: Printer connection, recognition, and spooler troubleshooting
recommendedActions: Check printer connection and power
Restart Print Spooler only through reviewed workflow
Use Get Help printer troubleshooter
Update or reinstall printer driver after confirmation

rules.title: SetupDiag Windows upgrade failure analysis
recommendedActions: Run SetupDiag against Windows Setup logs
Import SetupDiag output as diagnostic-only evidence

rules.title: Official DISM and SFC system file repair sequence
recommendedActions: Run DISM RestoreHealth before SFC when following official support guidance
Capture CBS.log and DISM.log
Keep RestoreHealth and SFC repair behind explicit RUN

rules.title: Windows unexpected restart and stop code evidence
symptoms: blue screen or black screen failure
recommendedActions: Record stop code and faulting module
Review driver and hardware evidence before repair

rules.title: Component store corruption check and repair
recommendedActions: DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /ScanHealth
DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /RestoreHealth
sfc /scannow

rules.title: Windows upgrade interrupted by restart or sign-out
recommendedActions: retry upgrade
keep PC plugged in
avoid restart or sign-out during upgrade

rules.title: Windows Update 0x80070002 missing or corrupt files
recommendedActions: Collect Windows Update and CBS evidence
Validate component store before repair

rules.title: Windows Update 0x80070422 service disabled or stopped
recommendedActions: Check Windows Update service state
Confirm policy or enterprise management before enabling services
Use explicit RUN gate before changing service startup

rules.title: Windows Update 0x80070490 driver operation failure
recommendedActions: Inspect update and driver installation evidence
Back up OS disk before advanced repair

rules.title: Windows Update file is damaged or missing
recommendedActions: DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /RestoreHealth
sfc /scannow

rules.title: Windows Update 0x800f0823 servicing stack required
recommendedActions: Confirm CBS.log servicing stack requirement
Install required servicing stack or cumulative update path

rules.title: Windows Update 0x800f0831 manifest or package corruption
recommendedActions: Inspect CBS.log for missing package identity
Use DISM/SFC only under explicit repair workflow

rules.title: Windows upgrade 0xC1900101 likely driver rollback
recommendedActions: Run SetupDiag and review driver evidence
Update or remove incompatible drivers only after confirmation
Do not auto-remove drivers

rules.title: Windows Update common error code map
symptoms: Windows Update download or install error
recommendedActions: Map the error code to Microsoft official guidance
Run Windows Update troubleshooter first
Collect Windows Update logs before repair
Use DISM/SFC only through explicit RUN repair workflow

rules.title: Windows Update corruption common error code set
symptoms: servicing stack or component store update failure
recommendedActions: Collect CBS.log and Windows Update logs
Run DISM/SFC checks as diagnostic or explicit RUN repair only

rules.title: Windows Update download connection errors
symptoms: Windows Update scan or download cannot reach update service
recommendedActions: Check network connectivity and proxy configuration
Collect Windows Update logs before any repair

rules.title: Windows Update troubleshooter and Get Help first-line path
symptoms: Windows Update error without local evidence
recommendedActions: Use Microsoft Get Help or Windows Update troubleshooter first
Import resulting output as diagnostic evidence
Do not invent findings when no output is available

rules.title: Windows Update cache reset with SoftwareDistribution and catroot2 rename
recommendedActions: net stop bits
net stop wuauserv
rename SoftwareDistribution
rename catroot2
net start bits
net start wuauserv
